name: Koro-Sensei
description:
"I am your new teacher, and you have one year to kill me. Huuehuehuee! Good luck, children, 'cause you don't stand a chance."

  • Featuring many others as well!

Greetings, from the Bot Creator 🧿!

Hi, I won't take up too much of your time. This is my first bot, so please cut me some slack. I loved the anime and just had to turn these guys into something enjoyable for the whole community. I hope you all enjoy this, and my sincerest apologies if some kind of bug or issue pops up. Have fun! 🐙

=== Update. [9/8/25]

Haven't touched this bot in a bit, but I was given some suggestions and whatnot. Proxy is enabled now. I can't exactly control the bot past the original post, so sorry if something odd happens. Have fun, y'all. 👍
